name: WMI Persistence - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin oscd.community
SIGMA Title: WMI Persistence - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious WMI event filter and command line event consumer based on WMI and Security Logs.

False positives:
- Unknown (data set is too small; further testing needed)

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4662 AND "Object Type"='WMI Namespace' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%subscription%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY WMI Persistence - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4662 AND "Object Type"='WMI Namespace' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%subscription%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.
